ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy storage resource */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the resource is located */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., battery, hydrogen) */,
  "total_storage_mwh" REAL /* Total storage capacity in MWh */,
  "start_storage_mwh" REAL /* Starting storage level in MWh */,
  "change_in_storage_mwh" REAL /* Change in storage level in MWh */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the resource expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance performed */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is scheduled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource (e.g., operational, under maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the resource */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the resource */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the resource as a percentage */,
  "installation_cost" REAL /* Cost of installing the resource */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the last maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the zone */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for managing the zone */,
  "total_storage_capacity_mwh" REAL /* Total storage capacity of all resources in the zone */,
  "current_storage_level_mwh" REAL /* Current storage level of all resources in the zone */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the zone data was last updated */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone where the zone is located, which can affect energy storage and usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage change event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource where the change occurred */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was logged */,
  "change_amount" REAL /* Amount of change in storage level */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change in storage level */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the change (if applicable) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_changes_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the maintenance (if applicable) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was approved (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_flows" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy flow record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource involved in the flow */,
  "flow_date" TEXT /* Date of the flow event */,
  "energy_in" REAL /* Amount of energy flowing into the resource */,
  "energy_out" REAL /* Amount of energy flowing out of the resource */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who logged the flow */,
  "source_resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource from which energy is flowing in (if applicable) */,
  "destination_resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource to which energy is flowing out (if applicable) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the energy flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_flows_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_flows_destination_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_flows_source_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, weekly, custom) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the report file (if stored as a file) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to perform the action */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the action was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert (if applicable) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved (if applicable) */,
  "resolution_details" TEXT /* Details of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the forecast */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zone relevant to the forecast */,
  "predicted_storage_mwh" REAL /* Predicted storage in MWh */,
  "actual_storage_mwh" REAL /* Actual storage in MWh on that date */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Name of the model used for forecasting */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forecast */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasting_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource related to the statistics */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date of the statistics */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the resource as a percentage */,
  "utilization_rate" REAL /* Utilization rate of the resource as a percentage */,
  "energy_generated" REAL /* Energy generated by the resource (if applicable) */,
  "energy_consumed" REAL /* Energy consumed by the resource */,
  "estimated_lifetime" INTEGER /* Estimated lifetime of the resource in years */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of maintenance required (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
